matches.title: Rajasthan Royals vs Delhi Capitals
commentary_chunks: 17.2 Cummins to Hardik, OUT! Caught by Warner at deep mid-wicket. Hardik tried to clear the boundary but didn't get enough distance. Massive wicket for Australia!
17.1 Cummins to Kohli, 1 run, yorker length on off, Kohli squeezes it out to point for a quick single.
16.6 Starc to Kohli, SIX! In the slot and Kohli punishes it over long-on. What a shot!
16.5 Starc to Kohli, FOUR! Short and wide, Kohli slaps it through cover. No chance for the fielder.
16.4 Starc to Hardik, 1 run, back of a length, tucked away to deep square leg.
16.3 Starc to Hardik, no run, beaten! Swing and a miss.
16.2 Starc to Hardik, SIX! Short ball, Hardik pulls it powerfully over deep mid-wicket.
16.1 Starc to Kohli, 1 run, pushed down to long-off.

activities.description: Hardik Pandya (12) c Warner b Cummins
activities.commentary_snippet: OUT! Caught by Warner at deep mid-wicket.

activities.description: Virat Kohli hits Starc for a massive SIX over long-on!
activities.commentary_snippet: SIX! In the slot and Kohli punishes it over long-on.

activities.description: Kohli finds the boundary with a crisp cover drive.
activities.commentary_snippet: FOUR! Short and wide, Kohli slaps it through cover.

activities.description: Hardik Pandya pulls Starc for SIX!
activities.commentary_snippet: SIX! Short ball, Hardik pulls it powerfully.
